name: 通用登录
description: 通用校园网认证任务：语义识别表单、智能判断结果，兼容大多数认证页面

steps.script: (() => { const val = ({{username}} || '').trim(); if (!val) throw new Error('账号为空'); const ok = el => el && !el.disabled && !el.readOnly; const ctx = el => [el.placeholder, el.getAttribute('aria-label'), el.name, el.id, el.className, el.labels&&el.labels[0]&&el.labels[0].innerText, el.closest('label')&&el.closest('label').innerText].filter(Boolean).join(' ').toLowerCase(); const score = el => { const t = String(el.type||'').toLowerCase(); let s = 0; if (t==='text'||t==='email'||t==='tel'||t==='') s+=5; if (t==='password'||t==='hidden') s-=30; const c = ctx(el); if (/账号|帐号|用户名|使用者|学号|工号|教职工|手机号|手机|user.?name|login.?id|account|userid|student/i.test(c)) s+=20; if (/密码|pass|验证码|code|captcha|sms/i.test(c)) s-=12; if (el.closest('[class*=login]')||el.closest('[id*=login]')) s+=3; if (el.autocomplete==='username'||el.autocomplete==='email') s+=5; return s; }; const all = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('input,textarea')).filter(ok).sort((a,b)=>score(b)-score(a)).slice(0,2); const pick = all[0]; if (!pick||score(pick)<1) throw new Error('未识别到账号输入框'); pick.dispatchEvent(new FocusEvent('focus',{bubbles:true}));const nativeSet=Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(HTMLInputElement.prototype,'value').set;nativeSet.call(pick,'');pick.dispatchEvent(new InputEvent('beforeinput',{bubbles:true,inputType:'insertText',data:val}));nativeSet.call(pick,val);pick.dispatchEvent(new InputEvent('input',{bubbles:true,inputType:'insertText',data:val}));pick.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keyup',{bubbles:true}));pick.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));pick.dispatchEvent(new FocusEvent('blur',{bubbles:true}));return true; })()

(() => { const val = ({{password}} || '').trim(); if (!val) throw new Error('密码为空'); const ok = el => el && !el.disabled && !el.readOnly; const ctx = el => [el.placeholder, el.getAttribute('aria-label'), el.name, el.id, el.className, el.labels&&el.labels[0]&&el.labels[0].innerText].filter(Boolean).join(' ').toLowerCase(); const score = el => { const t = String(el.type||'').toLowerCase(); let s = 0; if (t==='password') s+=30; const c = ctx(el); if (/密码|pass|passwd|pwd|口令/i.test(c)) s+=16; if (/账号|用户名|user|account/i.test(c)) s-=10; if (/确认|confirm|repeat|再次/i.test(c)) s-=20; return s; }; const all = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('input,textarea')).filter(ok).sort((a,b)=>score(b)-score(a)).slice(0,2); const pick = all[0]; if (!pick||score(pick)<1) throw new Error('未识别到密码输入框'); pick.dispatchEvent(new FocusEvent('focus',{bubbles:true}));const nativeSet=Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(HTMLInputElement.prototype,'value').set;nativeSet.call(pick,'');pick.dispatchEvent(new InputEvent('beforeinput',{bubbles:true,inputType:'insertText',data:val}));nativeSet.call(pick,val);pick.dispatchEvent(new InputEvent('input',{bubbles:true,inputType:'insertText',data:val}));pick.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keyup',{bubbles:true}));pick.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));pick.dispatchEvent(new FocusEvent('blur',{bubbles:true}));return true; })()

steps.description: 识别运营商（下拉框 / 单选按钮 / 按钮组）
steps.script: (() => { const isp = ({{isp}} || '').trim(); if (!isp) return true; const vis = el => { if(!el) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); if(!s||s.display==='none'||s.visibility==='hidden') return false; const r=el.getBoundingClientRect(); return r.width>1&&r.height>1; }; const norm = s => String(s||'').replace(/\s+/g,'').toLowerCase(); const want = norm(isp); const carrierWords = /运营商|isp|carrier|套餐|网络类型|宽带|服务类型|接入方式/i; const carrierKw = /移动|联通|电信|铁通|教育网|cmcc|cucc|ctcc|cernet|mobile|unicom|telecom/i; const sels = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('select')).filter(vis); for (const sel of sels) { const selfCtx = norm([sel.name,sel.id,sel.className,sel.getAttribute('aria-label')].filter(Boolean).join(' ')); const opts = Array.from(sel.options||[]); let best=null, bestS=-999; for (const o of opts) { const t = norm([o.textContent,o.label,o.value].filter(Boolean).join(' ')); let s=0; if (t.includes(want)||want.includes(t)) s+=30; if (carrierWords.test(t)) s+=6; if (carrierWords.test(selfCtx)) s+=4; if (/请选择|--/.test(t)) s-=5; if (s>bestS){bestS=s;best=o;} } if (best&&bestS>=10){sel.value=best.value;sel.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));return true;} } const radios = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('input[type=radio]')).filter(vis); if (radios.length >= 2) { const carrierRadios = radios.filter(r => { const label = r.labels&&r.labels[0]?r.labels[0].innerText:''; const ctx = [r.name,r.id,r.value,label,r.parentElement&&r.parentElement.innerText].filter(Boolean).join(' '); return carrierKw.test(ctx)||carrierWords.test(ctx); }); const pool = carrierRadios.length>=2 ? carrierRadios : radios; let best=null, bestS=-999; for (const r of pool) { const label = r.labels&&r.labels[0]?r.labels[0].innerText:''; const t = norm([r.value,label,r.parentElement&&r.parentElement.innerText].filter(Boolean).join(' ')); let s=0; if (t.includes(want)||want.includes(t)) s+=30; if (carrierKw.test(t)) s+=6; if (s>bestS){bestS=s;best=r;} } if (best&&bestS>=5){best.click();return true;} } const clickables = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('li,label,span,div,a,button')).filter(el => { if (!vis(el)) return false; const children = el.children.length; if (children > 3) return false; const t = norm(el.innerText); return carrierKw.test(t); }); if (clickables.length >= 2) { const parent = clickables[0].parentElement; const siblings = parent ? Array.from(parent.children).filter(vis) : clickables; if (siblings.length >= 2) { let best=null, bestS=-999; for (const el of siblings) { const t = norm(el.innerText); let s=0; if (t.includes(want)||want.includes(t)) s+=30; if (carrierKw.test(t)) s+=6; if (s>bestS){bestS=s;best=el;} } if (best&&bestS>=5){best.click();return true;} } } return true; })()

steps.description: 自动勾选服务协议（如有）
steps.script: (() => { const cbs = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('input[type=checkbox]')).filter(el => { if (el.checked) return false; const ctx = [el.name, el.id, el.value, el.labels && el.labels[0] && el.labels[0].innerText, el.parentElement && el.parentElement.innerText].filter(Boolean).join(' ').toLowerCase(); return /协议|同意|条款|已读|agree|accept|terms/.test(ctx); }); if (cbs.length > 0) { cbs[0].click(); } return true; })()

(() => { const vis = el => { if(!el) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); if(!s||s.display==='none'||s.visibility==='hidden') return false; const r=el.getBoundingClientRect(); return r.width>4&&r.height>4; }; const txt = el => String(el.innerText||el.value||el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'').replace(/\s+/g,'').trim(); const score = el => { const t=txt(el); let s=0; if (/^登录$|^登入$|^用户登录$|^账号登录$|^网络登录$|^上网登录$/.test(t)) s+=50; if (/登录|登入|认证|连接|上网|联网|确定|提交|connect|submit|login|sign.?in/i.test(t)) s+=20; if (/扫码|二维码|短信|微信|支付宝|qq|微博/i.test(t)) s-=30; if (/重置|取消|清空|退出|返回|注册|忘记|forgot|reset|cancel/i.test(t)) s-=20; const tp=String(el.type||'').toLowerCase(); if (tp==='submit') s+=8; if (tp==='button') s+=3; if (el.tagName==='A'&&el.href&&/#|javascript/.test(el.href)) s-=5; return s; }; const all = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button,input[type=submit],input[type=button],a[role=button],div[role=button],[class*=btn],[class*=submit]')).filter(vis); const pick = all.slice().sort((a,b)=>score(b)-score(a))[0]; if(!pick||score(pick)<3) throw new Error('未找到登录按钮'); pick.click(); return true; })()

on_failure.message: 登录失败，请检查账号密码或认证地址
